step_rationale: LDL composition; sphingomyelin reduction improves atherogenic lipid profile.
mechanism: LDL sphingomyelin content reflects lipoprotein composition changes; reduction by plant stanols lowers atherosclerotic burden.

references.title: Plant Stanol Esters Reduce LDL (Low-Density Lipoprotein) Aggregation by Altering LDL Surface Lipids: The BLOOD FLOW Randomized Intervention Study.
